# ps5-y2jb-appdb-fixup

On console attempt to workaround YouTube from softlocking when using Y2JB.

Port of the [appinfo editor](https://github.com/Gezine/Y2JB/blob/02eda2e772df629ecfe5a46459769bd8c994ef3e/appinfo_editor.py) python script.

## Usage

Send this [payload](https://github.com/illusionyy/ps5-y2jb-appdb-fixup/releases/latest/download/ps5-y2jb-appdb-fixup.elf) after Y2JB has killed the YouTube app.
